brief_summary: Hero art for the Trends pillar piece on Hall-effect switches going mid-premium-default: a 2px warm-grey switch cross-section with a coral magnet at the stem base, 4 coral elliptical field lines radiating outward, a coral Hall-sensor dot on the PCB plane, and warm-bronze accents on the top/bottom housing edges.
source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs (locked 2026-05-09)
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Cherry-style switch cross-section (top housing, cruciform stem, bottom housing) with a coral magnet at the stem base, four coral elliptical magnetic-field lines emanating outward, and a coral Hall-sensor dot on the PCB plane below the stem; warm-bronze edge accents on the top and bottom housing.
